$comment: packing-list screenshot traversal, copy-free. Generates qa/flows/mobile.yaml (run scripts/qa/compile-flow.mjs). Screenshot names match qa/screenshots.config.json sources (list, packers, types). Mirrors the proven hand-written flow, but deterministic: the seeded trip already carries packers, so no live add-packer typing (RN <Modal> content isn't in the iOS a11y tree anyway).

survival.$comment: T4 chaos net — state-survival subflow (compiles to qa/flows/state-survival.yaml; full profile + nightly, NOT per-PR). Core mutating action = add a packing item to the seeded trip (it auto-saves to disk). Then REAL process death (killApp on Android / stopApp on iOS), then relaunch keeping state and re-open the trip. Intent oracle: the item added before the kill is still on the list after it. The leading assertNot proves 'Compass' wasn't already there.
